translations.report.title: Results for {{client_name}}
translations.report.intro: This report summarises the risk profile assessed for {{client_name}}. The section below reflects the composure band from the latest questionnaire.
translations.results.composure.low_description: {{client_name}} tends to feel anxious when markets fall and may be tempted to sell at the wrong moment. Regular reassurance and a focus on the long-term plan will help.
translations.results.composure.medium_description: {{client_name}} stays reasonably calm through market ups and downs, but sharp falls can still cause unease. A clear plan and periodic check-ins should keep decisions on track.
translations.results.composure.high_description: {{client_name}} remains composed even in volatile markets and is unlikely to make rash decisions during a downturn. This supports a steady, long-term investment approach.
